title: Tribunal of Lieutenant Jones
summary: The Tribunal of Lieutenant Jones begins with him reportedly threatening his own Defendant, his crimes being announced as C-01 Intentional Homicide, law of warfare section III, law of tombs section I subsection I, B-01 unintentional homicide, A-02 disturbing the peace, and finally  C-07 habitual Class B violations by Prosecutor DeadBenz35.
